detectors.description:
DiamondDoge.sendETHToFee(uint256) (DiamondDoge.sol#765-771) sends eth to arbitrary user
	Dangerous calls:
	- _teamAddress.transfer(amount.mul(4).div(10)) (DiamondDoge.sol#767)
	- _marketingFunds.transfer(amount.mul(6).div(10)) (DiamondDoge.sol#769)
detectors.markdown:
[DiamondDoge.sendETHToFee(uint256)](DiamondDoge.sol#L765-L771) sends eth to arbitrary user
	Dangerous calls:
	- [_teamAddress.transfer(amount.mul(4).div(10))](DiamondDoge.sol#L767)
	- [_marketingFunds.transfer(amount.mul(6).div(10))](DiamondDoge.sol#L769)

detectors.description:
Reentrancy in DiamondDoge._transfer(address,address,uint256) (DiamondDoge.sol#631-733):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (DiamondDoge.sol#705)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (DiamondDoge.sol#747-759)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (DiamondDoge.sol#711)
		- _teamAddress.transfer(amount.mul(4).div(10)) (DiamondDoge.sol#767)
		- _marketingFunds.transfer(amount.mul(6).div(10)) (DiamondDoge.sol#769)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (DiamondDoge.sol#731)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (DiamondDoge.sol#939)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (DiamondDoge.sol#919)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (DiamondDoge.sol#921)
	DiamondDoge._rOwned (DiamondDoge.sol#341) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- DiamondDoge._takeTeam(uint256) (DiamondDoge.sol#933-941)
	- DiamondDoge._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (DiamondDoge.sol#893-929)
	- DiamondDoge.balanceOf(address) (DiamondDoge.sol#457-461)
	- DiamondDoge.constructor(address,address) (DiamondDoge.sol#403-421)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (DiamondDoge.sol#731)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (DiamondDoge.sol#947)
	DiamondDoge._rTotal (DiamondDoge.sol#353) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- DiamondDoge._getCurrentSupply() (DiamondDoge.sol#1089-1099)
	- DiamondDoge._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (DiamondDoge.sol#945-951)
	- DiamondDoge.constructor(address,address) (DiamondDoge.sol#403-421)
	- DiamondDoge.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (DiamondDoge.sol#561-583)

	[DiamondDoge._rTotal](DiamondDoge.sol#L353) can be used in cross function reentrancies:

detectors.description:
Reentrancy in DiamondDoge.openTrading() (DiamondDoge.sol#775-823):
	External calls:
	- uniswapV2Pair = IUniswapV2Factory(_uniswapV2Router.factory()).createPair(address(this),_uniswapV2Router.WETH()) (DiamondDoge.sol#787-789)
	- uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp) (DiamondDoge.sol#791-805)
	External calls sending eth:
	- uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp) (DiamondDoge.sol#791-805)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- tradingOpen = true (DiamondDoge.sol#813)
	DiamondDoge.tradingOpen (DiamondDoge.sol#377) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- DiamondDoge.openTrading() (DiamondDoge.sol#775-823)

detectors.description: DiamondDoge.openTrading() (DiamondDoge.sol#775-823) ignores return value by uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp) (DiamondDoge.sol#791-805)
DiamondDoge.openTrading() (DiamondDoge.sol#775-823) ignores return value by IERC20(uniswapV2Pair).approve(address(uniswapV2Router),type()(uint256).max) (DiamondDoge.sol#815-821)
